attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TERM_ID
,SEQUENCE_NUM  
,DUE_PERCENT
,DUE_AMOUNT
,DUE_DAYS
,DUE_DAY_OF_MONTH
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT
,DISCOUNT_DAYS
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT_2
,DISCOUNT_DAYS_2
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_2
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT_3
,DISCOUNT_DAYS_3
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_3
,CALENDAR
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CFN_AP_TERMS_LINES ST WHERE (
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_PAYMENT_TERM NVI
WHERE NVI.SK_TERM_ID_INT = ST.TERM_ID))

SELECT
  NVI.VENDOR_PAYMENT_TERM_KEY ,       
  COALESCE(SMAPL.SEQUENCE_NUM,-999 )BK_TERM_LINE_NUM_INT ,          
  COALESCE( SMAPL.DUE_PERCENT, 'UNKNOWN')PAYMENT_DUE_PCT_NAME  ,         
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DUE_AMOUNT,-999 ) PAYMENT_DUE_TRXL_AMT         ,  
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DUE_DAYS,-999 ) PAYMENT_DUE_DAYS_RMNG_CNT   ,   
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DUE_DAY_OF_MONTH,-999 ) PAYMENT_DUE_DAY_OF_MTH_INT  ,   
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_PERCENT,-999 ) DISCOUNT_PCT              ,     
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_DAYS,-999 ) DISCOUNT_DAYS_CNT           ,   
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH,-999 ) DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MTH_INT  ,      
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_PERCENT_2,-999 ) SECOND_DISCOUNT_PCT      ,      
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_DAYS_2,-999 ) SECOND_DISCOUNT_DAYS_CNT     ,  
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_2,-999 ) SECOND_DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MTH_INT ,
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_PERCENT_3,-999 ) THIRD_DISCOUNT_PCT         ,    
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_DAYS_3,-999 ) THIRD_DISCOUNT_DAYS_CNT       , 
  COALESCE(SMAPL.DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_3,-999 ) THIRD_DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MTH_INT  ,
  COALESCE(SMAPL.CALENDAR,'UNKNOWN' ) SPECIAL_CALENDAR_NAME   ,       
  EDW_CREATE_DTM        ,         
  EDW_CREATE_USER      ,          
  EDW_UPDATE_DTM        ,         
  EDW_UPDATE_USER      ,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
   FROM 
   (
   SELECT
SEQUENCE_NUM  
,DUE_PERCENT
,DUE_AMOUNT
,DUE_DAYS
,DUE_DAY_OF_MONTH
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT
,DISCOUNT_DAYS
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT_2
,DISCOUNT_DAYS_2
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_2
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT_3
,DISCOUNT_DAYS_3
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_3
,CALENDAR
,TERM_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CFN_AP_TERMS_LINES
UNION ALL
   SELECT
SEQUENCE_NUM  
,DUE_PERCENT
,DUE_AMOUNT
,DUE_DAYS
,DUE_DAY_OF_MONTH
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT
,DISCOUNT_DAYS
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT_2
,DISCOUNT_DAYS_2
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_2
,DISCOUNT_PERCENT_3
,DISCOUNT_DAYS_3
,DISCOUNT_DAY_OF_MONTH_3
,CALENDAR
,TERM_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CFN_AP_TERMS_LINES EX
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  STGDB_TS3.ST_CFN_AP_TERMS_LINES ST WHERE EX.TERM_ID = ST.TERM_ID AND EX.SEQUENCE_NUM = ST.SEQUENCE_NUM) 
) SMAPL
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_PAYMENT_TERM NVI
ON NVI.SK_TERM_ID_INT = SMAPL.TERM_ID
